subcodes.first_line: O Asadu'llah! Give praise unto the Desired One of all worlds, Who hath confirmed thee in His recognition in these days wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسدالله حمد کن مقصود عالمیان را که ترا موید فرمود بر عرفانش در ایامیکه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
